testcase.name: getAllowedTokens returns empty set for blank string
getAllowedTokens returns empty set for null
isStablecoin returns false for USDC contract - not supported on TRON
getAllowedTokens returns only USDT when USDT requested
getAllowedTokens returns only requested token for any contract
getWarningCode returns null - no dual acceptance on TRON
isDualAcceptanceEnabled returns false - TRON only supports USDT
isStablecoin returns true for USDT contract
getTokenSymbol returns TRC20 for unknown contract
isStablecoin returns false for empty string
getWarningCode returns null when tokens match
isStablecoin returns false for unknown contract
getTokenSymbol returns USDT for USDT contract
